description: Discards a duplicate in the final position if present.
Append the item from the 'left' list.

conditions: merged and left and right and (merged[-1] == left[-1] == right[-1])
description: Discard a duplicate if 'merged', 'left', and 'right' lists are not empty and the last items are equal.

conditions: not merged or not left or (not right) or (not merged[-1] == left[-1] == right[-1])
description: Do not discard a duplicate if any of 'merged', 'left', or 'right' lists are empty or the last items are not equal.
Merge items from 'left' and 'right' lists in order.
